response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with experience in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy, aligning well with the job requirements.
strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong expertise in multiple programming languages and technologies
Demonstrated ability to work on complex projects and lead technical decisions
concerns: Limited direct experience in high-throughput, distributed systems with strong reliability requirements
No explicit mention of experience with LLM, ML, or AI products in a professional setting
Basic German language proficiency might be a limitation in a Berlin-based team
